query:
-- Flag all 19 SasBoss $49 services as Cost Review Needed
UPDATE services 
SET discoveryNotes = CASE 
  WHEN discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes = '' THEN 'COST REVIEW NEEDED: $49 placeholder cost from Access4 pricebook — verify actual wholesale cost'
  ELSE CONCAT(discoveryNotes, ' | COST REVIEW NEEDED: $49 placeholder cost from Access4 pricebook — verify actual wholesale cost')
END
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 49.00;

-- Verify
SELECT COUNT(*) as flagged FROM services WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 49.00 AND discoveryNotes LIKE '%COST REVIEW NEEDED%';
